theme: Light/Dark Toggle, Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) + Apple Glassmorphism

typography.notes: Outfit for strong, clean, modern headings. Inter for highly legible data density. Use 'tracking-tight' on H1/H2. Overlines should be uppercase with 'tracking-[0.2em]'.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Whitespace-heavy, progressive disclosure, Linear/Stripe inspired. The 'Control Room' grid for dashboards.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-2xl for panels, rounded-xl for inner cards, rounded-lg for buttons

surfaces_and_micro_themes.cards: Glassmorphism variant (The 'Crystal' look). Use 'backdrop-blur-xl', a 1px subtle inner border ('border-white/20' for light or 'border-white/10' for dark), and 'shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)]'.

motion_and_interactions.hover: '-translate-y-1', 'shadow-lg', border color darkens/lightens slightly. Use 'transition-all duration-300 ease-out'.
motion_and_interactions.page_transition: Use 'framer-motion' for staggered fade-up effects on list items and dashboard widgets.

components.kpi_cards: Top-left primary KPI focus. Large numbers 'tracking-tighter', subtle trend indicators (e.g., +5% in green).
components.charts: Recharts or Shadcn charts. Use curved area charts with gradients. Tooltips must be glassmorphic.
components.tables: Shadcn tables. No vertical borders, faint horizontal borders. Hover state on rows.
components.pos_grid: Bento style grid for fast checkout. Large tap targets for products.

instructions_to_main_agent: You MUST use .js files for React components, NOT .tsx files. Write modern Javascript with standard prop types if needed.
Build a robust sidebar navigation (Stripe/Linear style) with links: Dashboard, POS, Inventory, Customers, Suppliers, Sales, Reports.
Implement light and dark mode using 'next-themes' or a custom context provider.
CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (kebab-case, role-based) to facilitate robust automated testing.
Use Phosphor icons ('@phosphor-icons/react') for elegant, modern dashboard icons.
The Dashboard should feature a 'Control Room' grid: primary charts taking up 2 or 3 columns, summary metrics in 1 column.
For POS checkout, use a dense bento grid. Make sure the cart summary stays fixed on the right.
Do NOT use pure #000000 or #FFFFFF for backgrounds; use tinted neutrals (e.g., zinc-950, slate-50).
Use Shadcn UI components but heavily customize them to match the glassmorphism and rounded-2xl Apple aesthetic. Do NOT just use the default Vercel look.
